scripts.migrate: docker compose run --rm backend python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.test:backend: docker compose run --rm backend python -m pytest
scripts.test:backend:unit: docker compose run --rm --no-deps backend python -m pytest tests/unit
scripts.test:backend:it: docker compose run --rm backend python -m pytest -m integration
scripts.test:frontend: docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend npm run typecheck && docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend npm run test:unit && docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend npm run test:integration && docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend npm run test:pages
scripts.test:frontend:unit: docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend npm run test:unit
scripts.test:frontend:integration: docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend npm run test:integration
scripts.build:frontend: docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend npm run build
scripts.test:e2e:headed: docker compose run --rm e2e npm run test:e2e:headed
scripts.test:e2e:ui: docker compose run --rm e2e npm run test:e2e:ui
